store_headline: WordPress Fitness Theme for Gyms and Trainers
store_subheadline: Display class schedules, sell supplements, and showcase transformations from one fitness website.
features: Fitness and bodybuilding-focused design and layouts
Class timetable and schedule management with MP Timetable
Portfolio showcase for transformation results and success stories
Video gallery with custom thumbnail generation for workouts
WooCommerce integration for supplements and fitness products
Product quickview and wishlist for streamlined shopping
Variation swatches for product sizes, flavors, and options
WPBakery Page Builder with fitness-specific content blocks
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
Facebook page integration for social proof
Widgets in menu for enhanced navigation options
Contact forms for membership inquiries and personal training
One-click demo import with complete fitness website setups
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
selling_points: MP Timetable class scheduling lets gym owners publish and display real schedules — no separate booking plugin
The only WolfThemes fitness theme with class timetables, BMI calculator, and nutrition tools — not just gym imagery
Transformation portfolio turns real client before/after results into the most credible sales tool a trainer has
WooCommerce built for supplements and gear — product quick view and wishlist included for comparison shoppers
Teal brushstroke accent and athletic photography signal a modern functional fitness brand, distinct from bodybuilding-era aesthetics
Trainer profile and certification display layouts establish personal coaching credibility without custom page building
Workout program showcase lets coaches present program offerings as structured products, not just blog posts
key_benefits: Launch a gym website with live class schedules powered by MP Timetable
Convert new members with before/after transformation galleries demonstrating real results
Sell supplements through WooCommerce with quick view and wishlist
Showcase workout programs and coaching packages as structured offerings for training clients
Attract gym owners and trainers with scheduling and nutrition tools
Build trainer credibility with profile layouts, certifications, and video workout galleries
design_features: Video workout galleries with custom thumbnails
Product catalogs for supplements and fitness gear
Multiple header styles with athletic aesthetics

testimonials.text: Nice and easy theme whit great plugins! It makes much fun and the support it's good!
testimonials.author: ShervinOne

testimonials.text: Beautifully designed theme...easy to customize and use!!
testimonials.author: lrdsgn

testimonials.text: Great theme, even the customer support is extremely fast!
testimonials.author: MichelGolovkin
